name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0009
purpose: Install the first MixtarRVS remote-access policy layer under /System, exposing SSH service, listener, configured port, user key inventory, network dependency, and backend status through a Mixtar-owned command while keeping OpenSSH and OpenRC unchanged.
non_goals: Do not add or remove SSH authorized keys.
Do not read or expose private host keys.
Do not replace OpenSSH or OpenRC yet.
known_limitations: mixtar-remote is a policy/status layer, not a native remote access daemon.
OpenSSH remains the live remote access backend.
Key management is inventory-only in this stage.
Listener audit confirms TCP LISTEN state through /proc/net/tcp and /proc/net/tcp6; PID/program ownership is not required without root.
The profile records the current user and address observed during staging, not a full multi-user remote access policy.
